MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-11-2021 - APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY CHRISTINA CHEN, ESQ. FOR NADINE WONG AND SALLY GRATZ, ESQ. FOR SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC GUARDIAN. THE COURT SET AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTY. CHRISTINA CHEN FOR JAN-29-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. THE COURT ASSIGNED A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TO JUDGE MARY WISS IN DEPT. 305. PARTIES TO E-MAIL JUDGE WISS TO SCHEDULE THE MSC AND TO PROVIDE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENTS OR TRIAL BRIEFS. IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, PARTIES ORDERED TO RETURN FOR TRIAL CALL ON JAN-20-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR COURT TRIAL. MS. CHEN WAIVED JURY TRIAL. IN ADDITION, NO JURY FEES POSTED. PARTIES MAY APPEAR VIA COURTCALL. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)
